verses.text: The LORD rides into Egypt on a swift cloud; her idols tremble, her heart melts, and He sets Egyptian against Egyptian under a cruel lord. The gods of Egypt cannot save her. God overturns both her idols and her unity.

The LORD rides into Egypt on a swift cloud; her idols tremble, her heart melts, and He sets Egyptian against Egyptian under a cruel lord. The gods of Egypt cannot save her. God overturns both her idols and her unity.

The LORD rides into Egypt on a swift cloud; her idols tremble, her heart melts, and He sets Egyptian against Egyptian under a cruel lord. The gods of Egypt cannot save her. God overturns both her idols and her unity.

The LORD rides into Egypt on a swift cloud; her idols tremble, her heart melts, and He sets Egyptian against Egyptian under a cruel lord. The gods of Egypt cannot save her. God overturns both her idols and her unity.
The waters of the Nile fail, the river dries, and the reeds and meadows wither. Egypt's lifeline is cut off. When God withholds, the very source of a nation's wealth dries up.
The waters of the Nile fail, the river dries, and the reeds and meadows wither. Egypt's lifeline is cut off. When God withholds, the very source of a nation's wealth dries up.
The waters of the Nile fail, the river dries, and the reeds and meadows wither. Egypt's lifeline is cut off. When God withholds, the very source of a nation's wealth dries up.
The fishers mourn, the weavers of fine linen are confounded, and all her workers are grieved. Her industries collapse. The judgment reaches every trade that propped up the land.
The fishers mourn, the weavers of fine linen are confounded, and all her workers are grieved. Her industries collapse. The judgment reaches every trade that propped up the land.
The fishers mourn, the weavers of fine linen are confounded, and all her workers are grieved. Her industries collapse. The judgment reaches every trade that propped up the land.

The princes of Zoan, Pharaoh's wise counsellors, are shown to be fools, unable to discern what the LORD has purposed. Earthly wisdom fails before God. The cleverest counsel is folly when it ignores His plan.

The princes of Zoan, Pharaoh's wise counsellors, are shown to be fools, unable to discern what the LORD has purposed. Earthly wisdom fails before God. The cleverest counsel is folly when it ignores His plan.

The LORD has mingled 'a perverse spirit' in Egypt, so she staggers like a drunkard, and even Judah becomes a terror to her. Confusion is God's judgment. He turns a proud nation's wisdom into helpless reeling.

In that day cities in Egypt shall speak the language of Canaan and swear to the LORD, with an altar to Him in the land, and He will send them a saviour. Grace reaches Egypt. The gospel will turn old enemies into worshippers of God.

In that day cities in Egypt shall speak the language of Canaan and swear to the LORD, with an altar to Him in the land, and He will send them a saviour. Grace reaches Egypt. The gospel will turn old enemies into worshippers of God.

In that day cities in Egypt shall speak the language of Canaan and swear to the LORD, with an altar to Him in the land, and He will send them a saviour. Grace reaches Egypt. The gospel will turn old enemies into worshippers of God.
The LORD shall be known to Egypt; He shall smite and heal, and they shall return and be healed. Judgment leads to conversion. God wounds the nations that He may turn and heal them.
The LORD shall be known to Egypt; He shall smite and heal, and they shall return and be healed. Judgment leads to conversion. God wounds the nations that He may turn and heal them.

A highway shall join Egypt, Assyria, and Israel, and God shall say, 'Blessed be Egypt my people, and Assyria the work of my hands, and Israel mine inheritance.' Old foes are reconciled. In Christ the nations are gathered as one people of God.
